title: Born Slippy (Nuxx)
meaning_summary: Born Slippy (Nuxx) remains an outsized catalog asset because of its Trainspotting association, rave-era status, and continuing playlist presence.
revenue_drivers: Film association keeps the song culturally active.
Electronic and nostalgia playlists sustain long-tail streaming.
The track remains one of the clearest identity markers for 1990s electronic crossover.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from film-linked catalog scale, strong streaming durability, and meaningful creator-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and creator royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
